settings.moderation: Nneɛma a wɔde di dwuma wɔ ɔkwan a ɛfata so
settings.following_feed_settings: Feed nhyehyɛe ahorow a edi hɔ
settings.following_settings_info: Saa nhyehyɛe yi fa Following feed no nkutoo ho.
settings.show_sample_saved_feeds: Kyerɛ nhwɛsode ahorow a efi aduan a wɔakora so mu
settings.update_email_title: Fa wo email no yɛ foforo
settings.update_email_desc: Yɛsrɛ wo kyerɛw wo email address foforo no.
settings.change_password_desc: Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wosesa wo password a, yɛde verification code bɛmena wo email account.
settings.curr_username_label: Wo nsa a edi mũ no bɛyɛ @{{handle}}.bsky.social
settings.own_domain_desc: Sɛ wowɔ w’ankasa domain a, wubetumi de adi dwuma sɛ wo nsa. Eyi boa ma wohu sɛ wo ho yɛ nokware.
settings.birthdate_private: Saa nsɛm yi yɛ kokoam de na wɔmfa mma afoforo a wɔde di dwuma.
settings.export_data: Fa me data no kɔ amannɔne
settings.export_data_title: Fa me data no kɔ amannɔne
settings.export_data_desc: Wo account archive no kura wo public data nyinaa a posts, media, ne profile ho nsɛm ka ho. Archive no wɔ CAR format mu na ɛnka private data te sɛ muted users anaa DMs ho.
settings.car_note: Saa ade yi yɛ nea wɔde sɔ hwɛ. Wubetumi akenkan pii afa data a wɔde kɔ amannɔne ho wɔ yɛn blog so.
settings.deactivate_account_desc: Wo profile, posts, feeds, ne lists no renhu bio mma Bluesky dwumadiefoɔ foforɔ. Wubetumi asan ayɛ wo akontaabu no adwuma bere biara denam wo a wobɛkɔ mu no so.
settings.deactivate_info: Sɛ wogyae akontaabu no a, ɛnpopa wo data. Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wopopa wo akontaabu no daa a, fa Delete Account option no di dwuma.
settings.delete_account_desc: Esiane ahobammɔ nti, ɛsɛ sɛ yɛde confirmation code kɔ wo email address so.
settings.delete_account_info: Wubetumi nso agyae wo akontaabu no bere tiaa bi, na woasan ayɛ adwuma bere biara.
settings.current_password_placeholder: Mprempren asɛmfua a wɔde hyɛ mu
settings.confirm_new_password: Si password foforo no so dua
settings.current_password: Mprempren asɛmfua a wɔde hyɛ mu
settings.handle_same: Eyi yɛ wo mprempren nsa dedaw
settings.muted_success: Ɔdefo no yɛɛ mum no yiye

feeds.end: Aduan a wɔde ma no awiei
feeds.discover_empty: Biribi foforo biara nni hɔ a wobehu de besi nnɛ.
feeds.following_empty_recent: No recent posts from nnipa a wodi wɔn akyi mprempren.
feeds.follow_more_cta: Di akontaabu pii akyi na woahu emu nsɛm pii.
feeds.discover_new_feeds: Hu Feeds Foforo a Wɔde Ma
feeds.discover_new_feeds_desc: Paw w’ankasa wo feeds! Feeds a mpɔtam hɔfo ayɛ boa wo ma wunya nneɛma a w’ani gye ho.
feeds.pinned_feeds: Pinned Feeds a Wɔde Ayɛ Nneɛma
feeds.no_saved_feeds: Wo nni feeds biara a wɔakora so.
feeds.following_end: Di nnipa pii akyi na woanya nsɛm pii...
feeds.feeds_guide: Feeds yɛ custom algorithms a wɔn a wɔde di dwuma no de coding ho nimdeɛ kakra si. Hwɛ akwankyerɛ yi na woanya nsɛm pii.
feeds.discover_description: Paw w’ankasa wo feeds! Feeds a mpɔtam hɔfo ayɛ boa wo ma wunya nneɛma a w’ani gye ho.
feeds.my_feeds_hint: Pin feeds na fa ka Home ho. Fa nhyehyɛe ahorow di dwuma ma nneɛma a wɔkra wɔ Home so.

moderation.title: Nneɛma a wɔde di dwuma wɔ ɔkwan a ɛfata so
moderation.muted_words_tags: Nsɛmfua & tags a wɔayɛ no mum
moderation.blocked_accounts_info: Akontaabu a wɔasiw ano no ntumi mmua wo nsɛm a woakyerɛw, nka wo ho asɛm, anaasɛ wɔne wo nni nkitaho. Worentumi nhu wɔn mu nsɛm na wɔremma wɔn kwan mma wonhu wo de.
moderation.no_blocked_accounts: Wonnya nsiw akontaabu biara ano. Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wosiw akontaabu bi ano a, kɔ wɔn profile so na paw "Block account" fi menu a ɛwɔ wɔn akontaabu no so no mu.
moderation.verification_info: Verification on Bluesky yɛ adwuma denam adanse a ɛkyerɛ sɛ domain bi wurayɛ so. Wubetumi ahwɛ sɛ wo nipasu denam DNS kyerɛwtohɔ a wobɛhyehyɛ anaasɛ fael bi a wode bɛkɔ wo wɛbsaet no so.
moderation.verification_dns_instruction: Fa TXT kyerɛwtohɔ bi ka wo domain no DNS nhyehyeɛ ho a ɛwɔ din ne boɔ a ɛdidi soɔ yi:
moderation.verification_http_instruction: Fa fael bi kɔ wo wɛbsaet no so wɔ ɔkwan a edidi so yi so a wo DID yɛ emu nsɛm:
moderation.verification_verify_btn: Hwɛ sɛ Domain no yɛ nokware
moderation.verification_failed: Verification no antumi anyɛ yiye. Yɛsrɛ wo hwɛ wo nhyehyɛe no na sɔ hwɛ bio.
moderation.hide_verifications: Fa agyiraehyɛde ahorow a ɛkyerɛ sɛ ɛyɛ nokware no sie
moderation.interaction_info: Wɔde saa nhyehyɛe yi bedi dwuma sɛ default bere a woreyɛ post foforo no. Wubetumi asiesie wɔn post-by-post afi nnwom hyehyɛfo no hɔ.
moderation.mentioned: Nnipa a woka wɔn ho asɛm
moderation.select_list: Paw fi wo list ahorow no mu
moderation.allow_quote: Ma kwan ma wɔmfa nsɛm a wɔafa aka
moderation.block_confirm: Wogye di sɛ wopɛ sɛ wo siw {{din}} kwan? Wɔrentumi nhu wo posts anaasɛ wɔne wo nni nkitaho bio.
moderation.unblock_confirm: Wogye di sɛ wopɛ sɛ wubue {{name}}?
moderation.mute_confirm: Wogye di sɛ wopɛ sɛ wo to {{name}} mu? Wɔn posts no renpue bio wɔ wo feeds mu.
moderation.unmute_confirm: Wogye di sɛ wopɛ sɛ wogyae {{name}}?
moderation.muted_words_title: Nsɛmfua & tags a wɔayɛ no mum
moderation.add_muted_word_title: Fa asɛmfua anaa tag a wɔayɛ no mum ka ho
moderation.muted_word_desc: Wobetumi agyina nsɛm a wɔde ahyɛ mu, tag ahorow, anaa n’abien nyinaa so ayɛ mum. Yɛhyɛ nyansa sɛ kwati nsɛmfua a wɔtaa pue wɔ nsɛm pii mu, efisɛ ebetumi ama wɔrenkyerɛ nsɛm biara.
moderation.exclude_following: Yi wɔn a wɔde di dwuma a wudi wɔn akyi no fi mu
moderation.your_muted_words: Wo nsɛm a woayɛ no mum
moderation.no_muted_words: Wonnya nyɛɛ muted nsɛmfua anaa tag biara
moderation.hide_completely_desc: Posts bɛsie koraa afi wo feeds no mu.
moderation.show_warning_desc: Wɔde kɔkɔbɔ a wɔde kata so bɛkyerɛ posts.
moderation.mod_lists_empty: Public, shareable lists of users ma bulk muting anaa blocking.
moderation.list_name_placeholder: s.e., s.e. Spammerfo a wɔde wɔn ho hyɛ mu
moderation.list_desc_placeholder: s.e., s.e. Wɔn a wɔde di dwuma a wɔde dawurubɔ bua mpɛn pii.
moderation.muted_accounts_info: Wɔbɛyi nsɛm a ɛfiri muted accounts mu afiri wo feeds ne notifications mu. Muting yɛ kokoam nsɛm.
moderation.no_muted_accounts: Wonnya nyɛɛ muted account biara. Sɛ wopɛ sɛ wo mute account bi a, kɔ wɔn profile na paw "Mute account" fi menu no mu.
moderation.content_filtering: Nsɛm a ɛwɔ mu a wɔde yiyi mu
moderation.enable_18_plus: Ma 18+ nsɛm a ɛwɔ mu no nyɛ adwuma
moderation.adult_content_desc: Nna ho mfonini ahorow a ɛda adi pefee.
moderation.sexually_explicit: Ɔbarima ne Ɔbea Nna Ho Nsɛm
moderation.graphic_media_desc: Graphic media anaasɛ nsɛm a ebetumi ayɛ mfonini.
moderation.non_sexual_nudity: Adagyaw a Ɛnyɛ nna mu kyɛfa
moderation.non_sexual_nudity_desc: s.e., s.e. adwinni mu adagyaw a wɔda no adi.
moderation.report_title: Amanneɛbɔ a Ɛwɔ Nsɛm a Ɛwɔ Mu
moderation.report_notice: Amanneɛbɔ boa yɛn ma yɛkɔ so nya mpɔtam a ahobammɔ wɔ. Yɛn moderators bɛsan ahwɛ saa nsɛm yi mu.
moderation.select_reason: Dɛn nti na worebɔ eyi ho amanneɛ?
moderation.reason_sexual: Nna mu Nsɛm a Ɛwɔ Hɔ
moderation.details_placeholder: Ka asɛm no ho nsɛm pii kyerɛ yɛn...
moderation.report_success: Amanneɛbɔ a wɔde akɔma. Meda wo ase!
moderation.content_hidden_desc: Saa nsɛm yi, wo nhyehyɛe no de asie
moderation.content_warn_desc: Ebia saa nsɛm yi bɛyɛ nea ɛyɛ nkate
moderation.bsky_moderation_service: Bluesky Moderation Dwumadibea a Ɛhwɛ Nneɛma So
moderation.bsky_moderation_service_desc: Bluesky adwumayɛfo a wɔyɛ adwuma wɔ ɔkwan a ɛfata so.

privacy.title: Kokoam Nsɛm ne Ahobammɔ
privacy.2fa_title: Anamɔn abien a wɔde di adanse (2FA) .
privacy.2fa_modal_desc: Ɛhwehwɛ sɛ wode koodu bi fa email so mena na ama woatumi akɔ mu.
privacy.app_passwords: App password ahorow a wɔde hyɛ mu
privacy.app_passwords_info: Fa app passwords di dwuma fa kɔ Bluesky apps afoforo mu a womfa wo account password nyinaa mma wɔn.
privacy.app_password_modal_desc: Fa eyi kɔ Bluesky app afoforo mu ka wo din a wode di dwuma no ho.
privacy.app_password_modal_warning: Hwɛ hu sɛ wobɛkyerɛw saa password yi mprempren. Worentumi nhu bio. Sɛ wohwere a, bɔ foforo.
privacy.app_password_input_desc: Yɛsrɛ wo kyerɛw din ma saa app password yi anaa fa nea wɔayɛ no randomly di dwuma.
privacy.app_password_access_messages: Ma kwan ma wɔmfa wo nkrasɛm no nkɔ
privacy.notify_posts: Ma kwan ma wɔmmɔ afoforo amanneɛ wɔ wo nsɛm a wode bɛto gua no ho
privacy.notify_posts_desc: Saa ade yi ma wɔn a wɔde di dwuma no nya amanneɛbɔ bere a woreyɛ asɛm bi no. Dum saa ade yi na ama afoforo a wɔde di dwuma no abam abu sɛ wɔrennya amanneɛbɔ bere a woreyɛ asɛm bi no.
privacy.followers_i_follow: Akyidifo a midi wɔn akyi nkutoo
privacy.logout_visibility_label: Bu apps nkuran sɛ ɛnkyerɛ me akontaabu mma wɔn a wɔagyae adwuma no
privacy.logout_visibility_desc: Bluesky renkyerɛ wo profile ne posts mma wɔn a wɔagyae adwuma no. Ebia app afoforo renhyɛ saa abisade yi anuonyam. Eyi mma wo akontaabu no nyɛ kokoam de.
privacy.logout_visibility_note: Hyɛ no nsow: Bluesky yɛ nkitahodibea a ɛbue na ɛyɛ ɔmanfoɔ. Saa nhyehyeɛ yi to wo nsɛm a wobɛhunu wɔ Bluesky app ne wɛbsaet no so nko ara, na ebia app foforɔ renkyerɛ obuo wɔ saa nhyehyɛeɛ yi so. Ebia wo nsɛm no da so ara bɛda so ara akyerɛ wɔn a wɔagyae adwuma no denam app ne wɛbsaet afoforo so.
privacy.learn_more: Sua pii fa nea ɛwɔ baguam wɔ Bluesky so no ho.
privacy.learn_more_public: Sua pii fa nea ɛwɔ baguam wɔ Bluesky so no ho.
